author: Tester <t@t.com>
body:
Status update (2026-06-22).

Three follow-up child tickets filed against the
"non-blocking follow-ups" the prior subagent surfaced in
this epic's body:

- `1c20aa3` `sync-resolve-divergence-tests` (feature) —
  storage-side unit tests for the op-space resolver. The
  load-bearing primitive has only integration coverage
  today; this is the safety net for future changes.
- `004dd23` `sync-investigate-dual-file-filter` (research)
  — verify whether the four-path filter in `history.rs` is
  actually redundant or load-bearing. The file's comment
  at lines 107-110 contradicts the prior subagent's
  "now-redundant" claim; pin the verdict with a test.
- `0896e4f` `sync-reenable-merge-cross-check` (feature) —
  remove the `touched_by_merge` guard in `read.rs` so
  `cross_check` runs across merges too. Blocked by
  `1c20aa3` (the resolver tests are the place to write
  minimal repros if divergences surface).

Dep chain: `1c20aa3` → `0896e4f`. `004dd23` is independent.

Epic body still reads feature-complete; these are
quality-tightening tickets, not new sync features.
